# Connector support matrix

<!-- Generated by pramen_core::connector::matrix_markdown — do not edit rows by hand; update the registry. -->

Support levels: **supported** (first-party, CI-backed), **preview** (shipped with
documented limits), **planned** (named, not in the default binary).

| Id | Kind | Level | Modes / schemes | Delivery | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.objectStore` | source | supported | file, s3 | work-unit checkpoints; at-least-once on crash between sink commit and mark-complete | Optional Azure/GCS in Phase 2; residency schemes validated when configured |
| `sink.postgres` | sink | supported | append, upsert | commit barrier; at-least-once across the post-commit checkpoint window | DSN from env (default PRAMEN_POSTGRES_DSN); secrets never in the spec |
| `sink.flightSql` | sink | preview | append | commit barrier; at-least-once across the post-commit checkpoint window | Upsert rejected at validate; optional Bearer from PRAMEN_FLIGHT_SQL_TOKEN (ADR 0008) |
| `sink.adbc` | sink | planned | append | commit barrier; at-least-once across the post-commit checkpoint window | E1.1; first warehouse chosen by demand (ADR); not in the lean binary |
| `transform.sql` | transform | supported | — | in-process; no external delivery contract | Deterministic; no network |
| `transform.wasm` | transform | supported | — | in-process; no external delivery contract | Fuel/memory/deadline limits; `pramen transform test` conformance |
| `transform.ai` | transform | supported | — | inference ledger records results; replays reuse without re-billing | Budgets and onInvalid policies; providers: mock, openai-compat, bedrock |
| `transform.ai.batch` | transform | supported | — | inference ledger records results; replays reuse without re-billing | Job ids recorded before await; crash reconcile without re-billing |
